allow: Bash(echo "=== TEST 3: POST /auth/refresh ===" curl -s -X POST http://localhost:5001/api/v1/auth/refresh -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d "{""refreshToken"":""$REFRESH_TOKEN""}")
Bash(echo -e "\n=== TEST 4: GET /auth/me (Protected) ===" curl -s -X GET http://localhost:5001/api/v1/auth/me -H "Authorization: Bearer $ACCESS_TOKEN")

Bash(echo -e "\n=== TEST 5: POST /auth/change-password (Protected) ===" curl -s -X POST http://localhost:5001/api/v1/auth/change-password -H "Authorization: Bearer $ACCESS_TOKEN" -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d "{""currentPassword"":""SecurePass123@"",""newPassword"":""NewSecurePass123@""}")

Bash(echo -e "\n=== TEST 6: POST /auth/forgot-password ===" curl -s -X POST http://localhost:5001/api/v1/auth/forgot-password -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d "{""email"":""student@example.com""}")
Bash(echo -e "\n=== TEST 7: POST /auth/logout (Protected) ===" curl -s -X POST http://localhost:5001/api/v1/auth/logout -H "Authorization: Bearer $ACCESS_TOKEN")
Bash(echo "=== GET /auth/me ===" curl -s -X GET http://localhost:5001/api/v1/auth/me -H "Authorization: Bearer $NEW_TOKEN")

Bash(echo -e "\n=== POST /auth/change-password ===" curl -s -X POST http://localhost:5001/api/v1/auth/change-password -H "Authorization: Bearer $NEW_TOKEN" -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{""""currentPassword"""":""""SecurePass123@"""",""""newPassword"""":""""NewSecurePass123@""""}')
Bash(echo -e "\n=== POST /auth/logout ===" curl -s -X POST http://localhost:5001/api/v1/auth/logout -H "Authorization: Bearer $NEW_TOKEN")
